title: wedelia forbesii
intro: Wedelia forbesii, also known as Wedelia, is a flowering plant native to India, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. It is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Wedelia forbesii include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and ointments, to leverage its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
